title: dolichos kongkandae
intro: Dolichos kongkandae, also known as Horse gram or Macrotyloma uniflorum, is a leguminous plant native to tropical Asia, particularly in India and Sri Lanka. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dolichos kongkandae include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, manage diabetes, and reduce the risk of heart disease. Herbal preparations of Dolichos kongkandae include powders, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed in various forms, such as capsules or as a tea, to harness its health benefits.
